title: Phase 21.2 — Push Recovery Report

diagnosis.push_error: Invalid username or token. Password authentication is not supported for Git operations.
diagnosis.root_cause: GitHub deprecated password-based HTTPS authentication. The stored credential at ~/.git-credentials uses a password, not a Personal Access Token (PAT). GitHub rejects password auth for git push operations.

recovery_options.status: REQUIRES_QASEM — Generate a Personal Access Token at https://github.com/settings/tokens with repo scope. Update ~/.git-credentials with https://USERNAME:TOKEN@github.com
REQUIRES_QASEM — Set up SSH key pair and add public key to GitHub
REQUIRES_QASEM — Install gh CLI and run gh auth login

workaround_attempted: None — all recovery methods require Qasem's GitHub credentials.
production_status: Local only — commit 9b056b9 has NOT been deployed to production. Vercel deployed commit 425a910 (Phase 21).
next_step: Qasem must provide a GitHub PAT or set up SSH. Once auth is fixed, push can proceed.
